0 = No 
1 = Yes
- = Not Assessed/No Information
575 OXGN_CNTNUS_ADMSN_CD OXGN_CNTNUS_ADMSN_CD Therapies: Oxygen - Continuous (Admission) CHAR 1 This column documents whether, at the time of admission, the patient was receiving continuous oxygen therapy. 0 = No 
1 = Yes
- = Not Assessed/No Information
576 OXGN_CNTNUS_DSCHRG_CD OXGN_CNTNUS_DSCHRG_CD Therapies: Oxygen - Continuous (Discharge) CHAR 1 This column documents whether, at the time of discharge, the patient was receiving continuous
